title: Local opinion: Arizona pipeline approval locks in fossil fuel future
description: Critics are sounding alarms after Arizona approved a major methane gas pipeline project, arguing it could deepen reliance on fossil fuels, increase water and climate impacts, and slow the state’s transition to renewable energy.

title: Why reading Adam Smith today does not feel like archaeology
description: Adam Smith is most often quoted for his ideas of the division of labour and the invisible hand. As the world is witnessing a return of economic nationalism, what are his views on protectionist measures?

title: Sacred Buddhist hall reduced to ash on Miyajima; ancient flame rescued
description: Wednesday's fire gutted the 1,200-year-old structure on Miyajima island, though the sacred flame was rescued and taken elsewhere before firefighters brought the blaze under control
